mapper.select: SELECT mall_key, mall_name, sort_order FROM hub_channels ORDER BY sort_order, mall_key
SELECT id, corp_id, user_id, mall_key, account_name, key, key2, auth_key, mall_id, mall_pw, use_yn, vendor_id FROM user_malls WHERE corp_id = #{corpId} ORDER BY mall_key, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_malls (corp_id, user_id, mall_key, account_name, key, key2, auth_key, mall_id, mall_pw, use_yn, vendor_id) VALUES (#{corpId}, #{userId}, #{mallKey}, #{accountName}, #{key}, #{key2}, #{authKey}, #{mallId}, #{mallPw}, #{useYn}, #{vendorId})
